title: Add ability to set fill style for a range
author: iabukai

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: @iabukai just wanted to check on the status of this PR - will you be able to address @Siemienik's comments?

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: @alubbe I've just made required changes, could you review this?

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: Please merge the current master into your branch

comments.author: iabukai
comments.body:
> 
> 
> Please merge the current master into your branch

@alubbe, done!

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: Thanks @iabukai - could you take a look at the review comments that @Siemienik and I left? Should be simple to address and then we're ready to merge

comments.author: iabukai
comments.body:
> 
> 
> Thanks @iabukai - could you take a look at the review comments that @Siemienik and I left? Should be simple to address and then we're ready to merge

I'll do it next week! 
Thanks for "pushing" me. I was lost for a while.

comments.author: alubbe
comments.body: no worries, just give it a shot when you have the time. too bad that you missed the mergefest, but I'm happy to have another look once you've made the changes 👍
